allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Users\\egaff\\vasilya\\Diplom_1_0.docx"\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $content -replace '<[^>]+>','' -replace '&','&' -replace '<','<' -replace '>','>' | Select-String -Pattern '\\S' | Select-Object -First 150)
